de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction

Class AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction.AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ConjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement, DisjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement, SimplePredicateAbstractionDomainElement

    public abstract class AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement
extends AbstractDomainElement
    A base class for abstract domain elements in a predicate abstraction lattice.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      protected AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement(boolean isTopElem)
      Constructs a new AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement that is a top element if isTopElem is set to true; otherwise, it is a bottom element.
        AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement(ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> predicates)
      Constructs a new AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement from a given list of abstraction predicates.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected abstract Term combinePredicates(Term preds, Term newPred, Services services)
      Combines the given predicate terms (classically using AND or OR).
      abstract boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj) 
      Term getDefiningAxiom(Term varOrConst, Services services)
      Return the defining axiom, instantiated for a given Term (skolem constant or logical / program variable).
      abstract java.lang.String getPredicateNameCombinationString()
      NOTE: This method should be defined in accordance with AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice.getPredicateNameCombinationString() .
      ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> getPredicates() 
      abstract int hashCode() 
      protected boolean isTopElem() 
      Name name()
      returns the name of this element
      void setPredicates(ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> predicates) 
      java.lang.String toParseableString(Services services)
      Returns a parseable String representation of this AbstractDomainElement.
      java.lang.String toString() 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement

        public AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement(ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> predicates)
        Constructs a new AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement from a given list of abstraction predicates.

      • AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement

        protected AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement(boolean isTopElem)
        Constructs a new AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement that is a top element if isTopElem is set to true; otherwise, it is a bottom element.

    • Method Detail

      • isTopElem

        protected boolean isTopElem()
        Returns:
        Whether this element is the top element of the lattice (the axiom of which is true for every input).

      • getPredicates

        public ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> getPredicates()
        Returns:
        The abstraction predicates for this domain element.

      • setPredicates

        public void setPredicates(ImmutableSet<AbstractionPredicate> predicates)
        Parameters:
        predicates - the abstraction predicates for this domain element to set.

      • name

        public Name name()
        Description copied from interface: Named
        returns the name of this element
        Returns:
        the name of the element

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class AbstractDomainElement

      • getDefiningAxiom

        public Term getDefiningAxiom(Term varOrConst,
                             Services services)
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainElement

        Return the defining axiom, instantiated for a given Term (skolem constant or logical / program variable). The term can be seen as a representative of this abstract domain element; the returned formula must formally specify this.

        If this element describes, for instance, all numbers divisible by 2, the method could return the formula "varOrConst % 2 == 0".

        Specified by:
        getDefiningAxiom in class AbstractDomainElement
        Parameters:
        varOrConst - The logical / program variable or skolem constant representing an instance of this abstract domain element.
        services - A services object.
        Returns:
        A JavaDL formula expressing that the given variable or constant represents an instance of this abstract domain element.

      • combinePredicates

        protected abstract Term combinePredicates(Term preds,
                                          Term newPred,
                                          Services services)
        Combines the given predicate terms (classically using AND or OR).
        Parameters:
        preds - Term with all previous predicates.
        newPred - The new predicate to combine preds with.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        The combination of preds with newPred.

      • getPredicateNameCombinationString

        public abstract java.lang.String getPredicateNameCombinationString()
        NOTE: This method should be defined in accordance with AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice.getPredicateNameCombinationString() . This is probably bad design, but a substitute of the Java shortcoming that there are no abstract static methods.
        Returns:
        The String which is used for combining the names of predicates for lattice types where multiple predicates determine an abstract element.

      • toParseableString

        public java.lang.String toParseableString(Services services)
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainElement
        Returns a parseable String representation of this AbstractDomainElement. It should always hold that, for an AbstractDomainElement e and the corresponding AbstractDomainLattice l, that l.fromString(e.toParseableString(), services).equals(e).
        Specified by:
        toParseableString in class AbstractDomainElement
        Parameters:
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        A parseable String representation of this domain element.

      • equals

        public abstract boolean equals(java.lang.Object obj)
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object

      • hashCode

        public abstract int hashCode()
        Overrides:
        hashCode in class java.lang.Object
